name: 10 Pack TRIPLE HELIX
description:
TRIPLE HELIX is an advanced peptide research blend engineered to support mitochondrial function, cellular energy production, and metabolic efficiency through three distinct yet complementary mechanisms.

By combining NAD+, MOTS-C, and 5-Amino-1MQ, TRIPLE HELIX simultaneously targets energy metabolism at the cellular, mitochondrial, and metabolic-regulation levels. This triple-pathway approach creates a synergistic effect far beyond what each compound can deliver on its own.

🔬 What’s Inside TRIPLE HELIX

  • NAD+ (100mg)
    A critical coenzyme involved in ATP generation, mitochondrial health, and cellular repair pathways and widely studied for its role in energy metabolism and cellular resilience.

  • MOTS-C (10mg)
    A mitochondrial-derived peptide known for regulating glucose utilization, improving insulin sensitivity, and enhancing fat oxidation through mitochondrial signaling.

  • 5-Amino-1MQ (10mg)
    An NNMT inhibitor studied for its ability to suppress adipocyte expansion, increase cellular energy expenditure, and support lean-mass signaling.

⚡ How the Triple Helix Works

Each component removes a different bottleneck in the energy-production system:

  • NAD+ fuels mitochondrial output

  • MOTS-C optimizes metabolic signaling

  • 5-Amino-1MQ shifts the system toward higher energy expenditure

Together, they create a coordinated metabolic environment that supports:

  • Enhanced mitochondrial efficiency

  • Increased ATP production

  • Improved metabolic flexibility

  • Reduced fat-storage signaling

  • Greater cellular resilience under stress

This is why TRIPLE HELIX is considered a true mitochondrial powerhouse blend.

🧠 Intended Research Applications

TRIPLE HELIX is designed for advanced research models investigating:

  • Mitochondrial dysfunction

  • Cellular energy metabolism

  • Fat-loss and body-composition signaling

  • Metabolic health and insulin sensitivity

  • Cellular aging and stress resistance

TRIPLE HELIX
Mitochondrial Powerhouse Research Blend

100mg NAD+
10mg MOTS-C
10mg 5-Amino-1MQ

Three Pathways. One Powerhouse.

For Research Use Only.
Not for human consumption. Intended solely for laboratory research by qualified professionals. Use in compliance with all applicable laws and regulations.

name: Kisspeptin-10 10mg
description:
Kisspeptin-10 10mg

Neuroendocrine Signaling Research Peptide

Kisspeptin-10 is a biologically active fragment of the kisspeptin protein family, widely studied for its critical role in hypothalamic–pituitary–gonadal (HPG) axis signaling and reproductive hormone regulation.

In research settings, Kisspeptin-10 is recognized as a powerful upstream signaling molecule that interacts with GPR54 (KISS1R) receptors, triggering cascades involved in gonadotropin-releasing hormone (GnRH) secretion.

🔬 Research Applications & Interest Areas

Kisspeptin-10 is commonly explored in studies related to:

  • Neuroendocrine signaling pathways

  • HPG axis regulation

  • GnRH pulse initiation

  • LH and FSH secretion dynamics

  • Puberty onset and reproductive biology

  • Hormonal feedback mechanisms

Due to its short amino acid sequence and high receptor affinity, Kisspeptin-10 is often favored in experimental models examining rapid hormonal signaling responses.

🧪 Product Details

  • Compound: Kisspeptin-10

  • Amount: 10mg per vial

  • Form: Lyophilized peptide

  • Purity: Research-grade

🧠 Research Notes

Kisspeptin-10 is valued for its role as a key regulatory switch in endocrine signaling, making it an essential tool for researchers investigating fertility, hormone communication, and neuroendocrine control systems.

⚠️ For Research Use Only
Not for human consumption. This product is intended strictly for laboratory research by qualified professionals. By purchasing, you agree to use this product in compliance with all applicable laws and regulations.
